source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/02_ADD (HAD1417MCW)/▶ CE MDD/■ 4. ADD(HAD1417MCW) Dimdi 등록관련 기술문서 제출 220215/D TCF/Attachment 04. Risk Management Report/04-03. Basic Safety, Essential Performance Report (A-TCF-5-048).pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: Basic safety and essential performance report for the ADD Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports technical file risk management evidence by defining basic safety, essential performance, EMC monitoring criteria, and pass/fail criteria.
keyPoints: Revision 1 dated APR/02/2021 revised the product name.
Operation check can be monitored by acquisition software.
EMC-related standards listed in the report show PASS results.
Immunity pass/fail criteria state that essential performance and basic safety shall not be affected before, during, and after testing.

entities.name: Jung, Woosuk

concepts.name: Basic Safety
concepts.evidence: This document is basic safety, essential performance of the ADD.

concepts.name: Essential Performance
concepts.evidence: Description of BASIC SAFETY and ESSENTIAL PERFORMANCE

concepts.name: Acquisition Software
concepts.evidence: Operation check of the product can be monitored by using the acquisition software.

concepts.name: EMC Test
concepts.evidence: DC power is consistently supplied from POWER SUPPLY when EMC test is performed.

concepts.name: Risk Management File
concepts.evidence: These pass/fail criteria shall be included in the RISK MANAGEMENT FILE

evidence.claim: The document is a Basic Safety, Essential Performance Report for ADD.
evidence.evidenceText: Basic Safety, Essential Performance Report for ADD Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

evidence.claim: The report number is A-TCF-5-048 Rev.1.
Operation check of the product can be monitored using acquisition software.
evidence.evidenceText: Operation check of the product can be monitored by using the acquisition software.

evidence.claim: The acquired image should be obtained as intended and should not have two adjacent lines or be blank.
evidence.evidenceText: Acquisition image is obtained as intended. - The acquired image should not have two lines adjacent or be blank.

evidence.claim: CISPR 11 conducted and radiated emission tests are listed with PASS results.
evidence.evidenceText: CISPR 11 Conducted Emission on AC mains Port PASS Radiated Emission PASS

evidence.claim: IEC 61000-3-2 harmonic current emission test is listed with PASS result.
evidence.evidenceText: IEC 61000-3-2 Harmonic Current Emission on AC Mains Input Port PASS

evidence.claim: IEC 61000-3-3 voltage fluctuations and flicker test is listed with PASS result.
evidence.evidenceText: IEC 61000-3-3 Voltage Fluctuations and Flicker on AC Mains Input Port PASS

evidence.claim: IEC 61000-4-2 electrostatic discharge immunity test is listed with PASS result.
IEC 61000-4-3 radio-frequency electromagnetic field amplitude modulated immunity test is listed with PASS result.
evidence.evidenceText: IEC 61000-4-3 Radio-frequency electromagnetic field Amplitude modulated Immunity PASS

evidence.claim: IEC 61000-4-4 fast transients immunity test is listed with PASS result.
IEC 61000-4-5 surges immunity test is listed with PASS result.
IEC 61000-4-6 radio-frequency common mode immunity test is listed with PASS result.
evidence.evidenceText: IEC 61000-4-6 Radio-frequency common mode Immunity PASS

evidence.claim: IEC 61000-4-8 power frequency magnetic fields test is listed with PASS result.
evidence.evidenceText: IEC 61000-4-8 Power frequency magnetic fields PASS

evidence.claim: IEC 61000-4-11 voltage dips and interruptions immunity test is listed with PASS result.
evidence.evidenceText: IEC 61000-4-11 Voltage Dips, Voltage Interruptions Immunity PASS

evidence.claim: Immunity pass/fail criteria require basic safety and essential performance not to be affected before, during, and after the test.
evidence.evidenceText: Before, during, and after the test, the essential performance and basic safety shall not be affected

evidence.claim: Specific immunity pass/fail criteria shall be based on applicable part two standards or risk management and included in the risk management file.
evidence.evidenceText: Specific, detailed IMMUNITY pass/fail criteria, shall be based on applicable part two standards or RISK MANAGEMENT, for IMMUNITY with regard to EM DISTURBANCES. These pass/fail criteria shall be included in the RISK MANAGEMENT FILE

reviewFlags.reason: Authority or jurisdiction is not stated in the source text.
Source metadata productSignal references HAD/A/F 1417-1717, but the source text identifies the product only as ADD.
The source path mentions CE MDD and authoritySignal mentions MFDS/domestic, but neither authority is confirmed in the source text.
Minor OCR/text quality issue: 'ltage Dips and Interruptions' appears with missing leading characters in the immunity criteria section.
